args.code: (() => { try { return JSON.stringify({ day: typeof day !== 'undefined' ? day : null, season: typeof season !== 'undefined' ? season : null, time: typeof time !== 'undefined' ? time : null, money: typeof money !== 'undefined' ? money : null, stamina: typeof stamina !== 'undefined' ? stamina : null, maxStamina: typeof maxStamina !== 'undefined' ? maxStamina : null, health: typeof health !== 'undefined' ? health : null, maxHealth: typeof maxHealth !== 'undefined' ? maxHealth : null, rice: typeof rice !== 'undefined' ? rice : null, sweet: typeof sweet !== 'undefined' ? sweet : null, fields: typeof fields !== 'undefined' ? fields.map(f => ({stage: f.stage, crop: f.crop, progress: f.progress})) : null, eventsToday: typeof eventsToday !== 'undefined' ? eventsToday : null, totalEventsTriggered: typeof totalEventsTriggered !== 'undefined' ? totalEventsTriggered : null, dailyActions: typeof dailyActions !== 'undefined' ? dailyActions : null, npcs: typeof npcs !== 'undefined' ? Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(npcs).map(([k,v]) => [k, typeof v === 'object' ? v.favor : v])) : null, skills: typeof skills !== 'undefined' ? Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(skills).map(([k,v]) => [k, {level: v.level, exp: v.exp}])) : null, autoPlayEnabled: typeof autoPlayEnabled !== 'undefined' ? autoPlayEnabled : null, gameSpeed: typeof gameSpeed !== 'undefined' ? gameSpeed : null, currentEvent: typeof currentEvent !== 'undefined' ? currentEvent : null, mode: typeof mode !== 'undefined' ? mode : null, fieldsCount: typeof fields !== 'undefined' ? fields.length : null }); } catch(e) { return JSON.stringify({ error: e.message, stack: e.stack }); } })()
